problem.item: The seed entrypoint (`src/endpoints/seed/index.ts`) is monolithic: running `npm run seed` upserts media, globals, pages (including hero/gallery/layout), forms, ops rows, CRM sequences, and demo fixtures in one pass.
Developers cannot selectively refresh “foundation” vs “marketing layout” vs “demo CRM” without re-running everything or hand-editing env flags.
Media reuse is implicit (e.g. same uploaded doc IDs for gallery top/mid/bottom); we lack visibility into redundant or accidental reuse when iterating on the homepage.
Tests should consume stable, module-scoped demo data — today demo seed is all-or-nothing (`SEED_SKIP_DEMO` only).

goals.goal: Layer data: **foundation** (admin users, minimal globals, migrations assumptions), **content** (media catalog, pages, layout blocks, nav), **demo** (personas, CRM/billing fixtures) — each runnable independently with clear dependencies.

Ship a **Grime Time–only** CLI (Node, `tsx`) with subcommands and flags comparable in ergonomics to Codex/Claude Code–style tools: discoverability (`--help`), dry-run, non-interactive CI mode, interactive confirmations for destructive or media-heavy operations.

**Safety**: default to non-destructive upserts; explicit `--force` / `--yes` for overwriting; **warnings** when seed would replace existing docs that differ from seed hash or when media uploads would duplicate bytes.
**Redundancy report**: static analysis of seed modules listing media ID/file reuse across slots (hero, service grid, gallery), with optional JSON output for CI.
**Tests**: Vitest integration tests import or invoke named demo modules; Playwright uses a documented “demo dataset” profile; avoid coupling tests to the full monolithic seed.

non-goals.item: General-purpose CMS content authoring CLI (Payload Admin remains the editor of record for copy).
Multi-tenant or multi-repo seed framework — only this codebase.

directory-layout.item: Keep Payload entry `seed({ payload, req })` as a thin orchestrator that delegates to **register modules** (functions with metadata: name, dependsOn, collectionsTouched).

Introduce a folder convention under `src/endpoints/seed/` (exact names TBD in implementation): e.g. `foundation/`, `content/media/`, `content/pages/`, `content/globals/`, `demo/crm/`, `demo/billing/`, `demo/marketing/` — each exports `runModule({ payload, req, context })`.
Optional parallel **manifest** JSON or TS (`seed.manifest.ts`) describing modules and dependencies for the CLI and docs.

cli-surface.item: Executable: `npm run grimetime` → `src/cli/grimetime.ts`; `npm run seed` remains thin wrapper to push orchestrator.
Shipped (2026-03): **`grimetime collections`** — `list`, `describe <slug>` (read-only; requires admin session like seed).

Shipped (2026-03): **`grimetime seed`** — scopes: `foundation`, `media`, `taxonomy`, `posts`, `forms`, `pages`, `globals`, `ops`, `crm`, `demo`, `all`. Verbs: **`push`** (uses dependency expansion), **`list`**, **`summary`** (`--json`), **`check`** (still expands deps for integrity), **`pull`** / **`delete`**: **requested scopes only** (no dep expansion — `pull globals` ≠ pull pages); **`delete all`** runs scopes in `DELETE_SCOPE_ORDER` in `seed-delete.ts`. Contract test: `tests/int/seed/expectations-alignment.int.spec.ts`.
Still planned: `--only`, `--no-input`, redundancy `report`, deeper `check` diffs, optional `pull`/`delete` JSON output.
Media safety: on upload paths, prompt or warn when replacing existing `media` by filename or checksum; list affected page references.

redundancy-detection.item: Build a **seed static analyzer** that walks exported page/layout objects and collects `media` relationship IDs and file paths from seed builders.
Report: same `media` id used in multiple layout slots; same file path mapped to multiple logical roles; recommend distinct assets from `image-generation-manifest` or stock set.
Optional: fail CI on new duplicate assignments when `STRICT_SEED_MEDIA=1`.

testing-strategy.item: Unit: pure functions for manifest parsing, redundancy detection, module dependency sorting.
Integration: run targeted module against test DB (existing Vitest pattern) with `SEED_SKIP_DEMO` irrelevant — module-scoped fixtures.
E2E: document env + seed profile that guarantees demo personas and a known homepage state for Playwright; avoid full `all` unless nightly.

migration.item: Phase A: extract **read-only** module boundaries from current `index.ts` without behavior change; `npm run seed` still calls full graph.
Phase B: implement CLI router + dry-run; keep admin `/next/seed` calling `all` or `foundation+demo` per DECISION.
Phase C: split demo into submodules + wire tests; add redundancy report to CI optional job.

tasks.task: Module graph + `registerModule` pattern; extract foundation slice from `index.ts`
Media module: uploads, dedup warnings, optional strict mode
Pages/layout module: home hero, service grids, gallery slots — fix duplicate media assignments per redundancy report
Demo submodules (CRM, billing, marketing personas) + `SEED_SKIP_DEMO` mapping to subgraph
Tests: Vitest for planner + redundancy; integration hooks for module-scoped seed; e2e doc for profile
